caption: (Kaza et al. 2018)
description: A grouped bar chart showing projected municipal solid waste (MSW) generation in millions of tonnes per year for seven global regions across three years: 2016 (light blue), 2030 (yellow), and 2050 (orange). Regions include Middle East and North Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa, Latin America and Caribbean, North America, South Asia, Europe and Central Asia, and East Asia and Pacific.
